name: SIAPSEZ Platform
description: Web platform digitizing and automating the complete ecosystem and administrative processes for the State of Zacatecas Department of Public Education.

data.description: Responsible for the design and development of the SIAPSEZ Front-End, a digital platform centralizing analog and fragmented processes for the Zacatecas Department of Education. Focused on user experience (UX) and the continuous integration of new modules.

Architected and implemented core system infrastructure, including dynamic navigation systems, global utility functions, shared component libraries, and robust authentication flows to ensure a professional, consistent, and intuitive user experience across the entire enterprise suite.

Established high-level technical standards for a Front-End team within a TypeScript/Next.js environment, encompassing documentation protocols, styling architectures, and best practices that significantly enhanced application performance and long-term maintainability.

Optimized development velocity in a complex enterprise setting by leading architectural decision-making and implementing modular workflows that allowed for faster feature delivery and reduced technical debt.

metadata.title: Eduardo Meza | Projects
metadata.excerpt: Software engineer specialized in developing web applications using Next.js, TypeScript and Node.js.
